mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.color, t.create_time, COUNT(at.article_id) as articleCount FROM blog_tag t LEFT JOIN blog_article_tag at ON t.id = at.tag_id LEFT JOIN blog_article a ON at.article_id = a.id AND a.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY articleCount DESC

SELECT FROM blog_tag
WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.color, t.create_time FROM blog_tag t INNER JOIN blog_article_tag at ON t.id = at.tag_id WHERE at.article_id = #{articleId}

SELECT t.id, t.name, t.color, t.create_time, COUNT(at.article_id) as articleCount FROM blog_tag t LEFT JOIN blog_article_tag at ON t.id = at.tag_id LEFT JOIN blog_article a ON at.article_id = a.id AND a.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY articleCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.name, COUNT(at.article_id) as value FROM blog_tag t LEFT JOIN blog_article_tag at ON t.id = at.tag_id LEFT JOIN blog_article a ON at.article_id = a.id AND a.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT FROM blog_tag ORDER BY create_time DESC
